decisions.rationale: IR re-read confirms Link_nav_ defines only base properties plus is_hovered (font_color var(--color_primary_default)); no Bubble active-route state exists. DS-01 AC-2 scopes IR hover/disabled state mapping — aria-current is a standard SPA/a11y convention for active NavLinks already consumed by SHELL-02-sidebar-navigation. Prior rewrite blockers B-1/B-2 (non-IR background-color on hover/aria-current) are resolved; current rule applies primary color + font-weight only, matching hover semantics without violating IR. Review ui_evidence passes this selector; low-priority informational finding does not warrant fix_now or defer.

summary: 0 fix_now, 0 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, all ACs and functional checks pass, prior B-1/B-2 Link_nav_ background-color rewrite verified resolved. C-1 accepted as intentional SPA extension outside Bubble IR scope.
